tools.name: get_tour_overview
tools.title: Get tour overview
tools.description: Return the East Java 5D4N tour overview: title, location, duration, rating, operator, currency, base price, and highlights.

tools.name: get_itinerary
tools.title: Get tour itinerary
tools.description: Return the day-by-day itinerary for the East Java 5D4N tour.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.title: Get tour pricing
tools.description: Return the full per-person pricing tier table for the East Java 5D4N tour, and optionally quote a price for a specific group size.

travelers.description: Optional group size. If provided, also returns the matching tier and total price.

tools.name: get_inclusions
tools.title: Get tour inclusions
tools.description: Return what is included and not included in the East Java 5D4N tour price.

tools.name: get_faq
tools.title: Get tour FAQ
tools.description: Return frequently asked questions about the East Java tour. Optionally filter by a keyword that must appear in the question or answer.

keyword.description: Optional case-insensitive keyword to filter FAQ entries.
